sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n115906" key="yuxole/ths" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ψῡχ-ολέτης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n115906.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">soul-destroyer,</tr_> ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0087.tlg036:211" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">211</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
